_meta.purpose: Issue-driven workflow with WORKFLOW.md template rendering. Connects to issue trackers via workflow_context.

model_strategy.quality: sonnet for implementer (issue work needs reasoning), haiku for reviewer (verify against spec)
model_strategy.optimization: workflow_context passes structured issue data — worker doesn't need to parse tickets. Bootstrap hooks are idempotent.
model_strategy.token_saving: compact directive, workflow template avoids repeating issue details in each worker prompt

improvements: Archive enabled for issue audit trail
Reviewer checks deliverables AND scope compliance in one pass

issue.title: Fix flaky test in CI
issue.description: The integration test intermittently fails on Windows runners.

agents.name: issue-implementer
agents.mission: Execute the current issue against the local repository. Stay within declared writable scope.
agents.task: Implement the requested issue in this repository. Validate the change against the issue's acceptance criteria and stop when they are met.
success_criteria: Requested deliverable files exist and reflect the issue resolution.
validation: Confirm implementation addresses the issue description.
Confirm no files outside writable scope were modified.
return_contract: Implementation summary: what changed and why.
PASS or FAIL per validation check.
stop_when: Issue acceptance criteria met. Do not gold-plate or expand scope.

agents.name: issue-reviewer
agents.mission: Review the implementation for correctness, scope compliance, and readiness for handoff.
agents.task: Review the deliverables against the original issue spec. Check correctness, scope compliance, and completeness.
validation: No obvious regressions or missing validation.
stop_when: Review verdict delivered. Do not modify files.
